description: Process the lost deal for the Potential 'Apex Corp - Q3 Hardware Restock' in Vtiger CRM. Update its Sales Stage to 'Closed Lost' and include a note in the Description field explaining it was lost to a competitor. Upload the file /home/ga/Documents/competitor_pricing_apex.pdf as a Document titled 'Competitor Pricing - Apex' linked to this Potential. Create a linked To Do task with the subject 'Follow up - Competitor Contract expiration', status 'Not Started', and due date '2026-09-09'.
